channel.title: Nauman Mustafa
channel.description: Technical writing by Nauman Mustafa on AI systems and software engineering.

item.title: 4 Years of Engineering Experience in 4 Months
item.description: AI changed my job from writing every line to directing parallel software systems. This is my field report from that shift.

item.title: From Vibe Coding to Compound Engineering
item.description: A software engineer journey from vibe coding to compound engineering, and what AI changes about architecture, intent, and code quality.

item.title: Lessons From Vibe Coding an iOS App
item.description: Field notes from building an iOS app with AI coding tools, covering what worked, what failed, and how to ship faster with quality.

item.title: MLUI Mobile: Autify OCR vs. Google OCR
item.description: A benchmark of Autify OCR versus Google OCR on rendered mobile UI text, including methodology, accuracy metrics, and failure analysis.

item.title: Token Compression: Reducing Attention Waste?
item.description: An experiment on compressing multiple LLM tokens into one representation for faster decoding and longer effective context.

item.title: A quest for very long context: Part 1
item.description: Experiments on extending transformer context length, including training observations, tradeoffs, and lessons from long-context tuning.

item.title: GPT-4 Predictions - Nauman Mustafa | LinkedIn Post
item.description: A short opinion post on GPT-4 expectations, scaling constraints, and likely directions for next-generation language models.

item.title: Machine Learning Features in Autify for Mobile
item.description: How Autify for Mobile uses machine learning for visual regression testing, visual self-healing, and AI-powered app exploration.

item.title: Solving Automated App Navigation: A Use-case
item.description: A case study on automated mobile app navigation using behavior cloning and heatmap prediction for tap-location modeling.

item.title: Applying Modern Deep Learning in Autify
item.description: A practical guide to applying modern deep learning and pre-trained NLP models in production software and product workflows.

item.title: Getting the Most Out of Pre-trained Models
item.description: How to use pre-trained NLP models effectively for text generation and question answering, with practical examples and tradeoffs.

item.title: Recent AI Advancements in 2019
item.description: A 2019 snapshot of major AI breakthroughs across text, image, audio, and video generation, with practical startup use cases.

item.title: GANs for Icon Generation
item.description: Using GANs to generate unique icon designs, with model behavior examples and creative applications for design workflows.

item.title: Deploy ML Models on Google Cloud Run
item.description: Step-by-step tutorial for packaging and deploying a machine learning app to Google Cloud Run with Docker and Cloud Shell.

item.title: Cloud Run — Future Tech Brought to you by Google
item.description: Overview of Google Cloud Run and how serverless containers can simplify deployment, scaling, and cost management for ML applications.

item.title: Deep Learning in Cloud — Cheap but High Quality
item.description: A cost-focused comparison of cloud GPU options for deep learning across AWS, Paperspace, Colab, and Google Cloud preemptible machines.
